      public Optional<net.minecraft.core.BlockPos> getNearestWithinRange(net.minecraft.world.phys.Vec3 pos, double range, net.minecraft.world.level.block.Block... blocks)
      Scans a radius for the closest block of a given type .
      Parameters:
      pos - The center of this radius
      range - Radius to scan for
      blocks - What blocks to check for
